overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit urban downtown. The player character descends stairs from a building, crosses wet intersections, walks down a main street beneath an illuminated SEOCHO sign, and explores an elevated pedestrian plaza featuring a glass-walled rock garden.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete stairwell with glass railings

events.description: exits the covered stairwell into the open rainy plaza

agents.ego_description: walking down a concrete staircase with glass railings, transitioning from indoor shelter to the rainy exterior

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete walls lining the stairwell descent
transparent glass panels with metal frames along the staircase
rain-slicked concrete plaza visible at the bottom of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered concrete stairwell with glass railings. The player descends the stairs as heavy rain becomes visible through the opening ahead, transitioning from the sheltered interior to the wet urban plaza below.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with yellow striped crosswalks

events.description: pedestrian with red umbrella crosses the crosswalk from left to right
black vehicle drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide wet intersection, navigating through sparse pedestrian traffic and observing the surrounding neon-lit towers

notable_agents.action: person holding a red umbrella walking across the crosswalk
black car driving through the wet intersection

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows and neon accents
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall palm tree visible against the building backdrop

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a wide-open urban intersection with heavy rain falling. Yellow-striped crosswalks span the wet asphalt while neon-lit glass towers rise in the background. A pedestrian with a red umbrella crosses the path, and a black vehicle drives through the intersection as the player continues across.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown street beneath overhead signage

events.description: turns left onto the main street heading toward the illuminated SEOCHO overhead sign
vehicle with headlights on approaches from down the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the wet multi-lane street toward the large illuminated SEOCHO sign overhead

notable_agents.action: car with bright headlights approaching from the distance down the rain-soaked street

entered.detail: large illuminated white sign spelling SEOCHO spanning across the street
array of large vertical digital advertisement screens on building facades
white painted directional arrows on the wet asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: Turning onto the main street, the player walks beneath a massive illuminated SEOCHO sign spanning the road. The street is lined with towering digital billboards and neon-lit buildings. A vehicle approaches with headlights cutting through the rain as the player continues down the center of the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with glass-walled rock garden feature

events.description: turns left and ascends concrete stairs to the upper plaza level
approaches the glass-walled pit and looks down into the rock garden below

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to the upper plaza, then exploring the elevated area and looking down into the illuminated rock garden pit

notable_agents.action: person sitting hunched over on a yellow bench in the rain

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading up to the elevated pedestrian plaza
sunken garden area with large rocks and boulders visible through glass walls
transparent glass barriers surrounding the sunken rock garden
yellow-topped concrete bench with a person sitting on it

segments.scene_description: The player turns left and ascends to an elevated pedestrian plaza, passing a person sitting on a yellow bench. The upper level features a unique glass-walled rock garden pit with large boulders visible below. Digital billboards surround the plaza as the player explores the area and looks down into the illuminated sunken garden.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered concrete stairwell into the rain-drenched neon heart of a futuristic city. It begins with a descent through a covered stairwell with glass railings, moving from the dry interior toward the heavy rainfall of the urban plaza below. As the camera emerges into a wide-open intersection, the scene expands to reveal yellow-striped crosswalks and towering glass skyscrapers, passing a pedestrian with a red umbrella and a black vehicle on the wet asphalt. The movement then shifts onto a main street, passing beneath a massive illuminated SEOCHO sign and towering digital billboards as headlights cut through the rain. Finally, the camera turns left and ascends to an elevated pedestrian plaza, passing a yellow bench before looking down into a sunken, glass-walled rock garden surrounded by glowing advertisements.
